query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM products WHERE JSON_LENGTH(images) > 0 AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM products WHERE JSON_LENGTH(images) > 0 AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(images, '"/storage/"')
